title: Risk Analyst Vacancy at Fyers - 2026 Batch

jsonLd.title: Risk Analyst Vacancy at Fyers - 2026 Batch
jsonLd.description:
If you're a passionate Risk Analyst with drive and ambition, Fyers in Bhopal is the place for you. We're growing fast and need talented people to grow with us.

About Fyers:
Fyers is a leading organization in the Hybrid sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Coordinate with external auditors during annual audits
• Prepare and analyze financial statements, reports, and budgets
• Maintain general ledger and ensure accurate bookkeeping
• Liaise with banks, regulators, and financial institutions
• Prepare MIS reports for senior management review
• Monitor financial performance against targets and provide variance analysis
• Monitor market trends and provide investment recommendations

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• BPharm / MPharm / PharmD
• 10-15 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Tally
• Proficiency in Power BI
• Proficiency in MS Excel
• Proficiency in Ind AS
• Proficiency in IFRS
• Proficiency in Due Diligence
• Proficiency in Income Tax
• Proficiency in Budgeting

Work Mode: Hybrid - Flexible work-from-home and office

What We Offer:
• Flexible working hours
• Learning & development budget
• Transportation and conveyance allowance
• Modern office with recreational facilities
• International travel opportunities for senior roles
• Recognition and rewards programs
• Salary Range: 20 LPA - 40 LPA per annum

Location: Bhopal, Madhya Pradesh, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Fyers!
